parameters.query:
SELECT a.id,
  to_char(a.data AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS data_br,
  to_char(a.data AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo', 'HH24:MI')    AS hora_br,
  cli.nome AS cliente_nome, cli.telefone AS cliente_tel,
  p.nome   AS barbeiro_nome, bu.telefone AS barbeiro_tel,
  t.nome   AS barbearia,
  COALESCE(string_agg(DISTINCT s.nome, ', '), 'Serviço') AS servicos
FROM agendamento a
JOIN usuario cli        ON cli.id = a."usuarioId"
JOIN profissional p     ON p.id  = a."profissionalId"
LEFT JOIN usuario bu    ON bu.id = p."usuarioId"
JOIN tenant t           ON t.id  = a."tenantId"
LEFT JOIN "_AgendamentoToServico" ags ON ags."A" = a.id
LEFT JOIN servico s     ON s.id  = ags."B"
WHERE a."tenantId" = 1
  AND a.id > {{ $json.ultimoId || 0 }}
  AND a."createdAt" >= now() - interval '1 hour'
  AND a.status IN ('agendado','confirmado')
GROUP BY a.id, a.data, cli.nome, cli.telefone, p.nome, bu.telefone, t.nome
ORDER BY a.id ASC
